'''Rafa V''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] and the homeworld of the [[Sharu/Legends|Sharu]] [[Species/Legends|species]].

==Description==
The eleven [[Planet/Legends|planets]] and numerous moons of the Rafa system were covered with the enormous plastic ruins of the ancient Sharu. The buildings were among the largest constructions in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]] and were quite impenetrable. Many [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonies, dating from the early days of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], sprung up around and between the structures.

The Rafa system was also inhabited by a primitive humanoid species known as the [[Sharu/Legends|Toka]], who were treated as [[Slavery/Legends|slaves]] by the Rafa colonists.

The system was famous for its [[life-orchard]]s—groves of crystalline trees whose crystal "fruit" could extend an individual's life when harvested and worn. Working among the crystal trees themselves, however, drained a person's life and intellect, and consequently most of the harvesting was done by the Toka or the criminals in the Rafa's numerous penal colonies. Rafa V was also the only known place where [[Firkrann]] lightsaber crystals could be found.

==History==
In the millennia before the rise of the [[Infinite Empire/Legends|Infinite Empire]] of the [[Rakata/Legends|Rakata]] or the later [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]], the Rafa system was home to an advanced [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] species called the Sharu who were responsible for building the [[Great Pyramid|colossal plastic pyramids]] on the worlds of the [[Rafa system/Legends|Rafa system]] and the [[Mindharp of Sharu/Legends|Mindharp]] of Sharu which was a strange object that constantly changed form as it shifted through dimensions.

They were exploited by the [[Human/Legends|Human]] colonists as slaves. In [[4 BBY/Legends|4 BBY]], [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]] discovered the Mindharp. [[Rafa IV]]'s [[Governor/Legends|governor]] inadvertently activated the Mindharp and its subharmonic emanations started a reversal of the social order in the Rafa system. The Toka were restored as the legendary Sharu while the pyramids crumbled, with strange, new cities emerging. This also created an [[Interdiction field/Legends|interdiction field]] which prevented [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel into and out of the system for weeks. Many of the Human settlements had also been destroyed, and the surviving settlers fled. Trade with the Rafa system also collapsed overnight.

However, this event brought countless scientists and researchers to the Rafa system. Calrissian was also considered a hero by many for his role in the event. Though the Sharu did not prevent the scientists from doing their work, neither did they cooperate with what they perceived as "lesser sentients". As a result, little is known on Sharu history and technology. Even [[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]] himself felt threatened enough by the species to install a permanent military garrison in the Rafa system. However, his forces did not make any military move against the Sharu. Later, the New Republic had a five-hundred member research team staffed by the [[Obroan Institute for Archaeology]] assigned to research the species.

{{Planet-stub}}
